title: Asexual Professional Greenputt Tour

{{Quote|The new tour joins the Professional Greenputt Tour (PGT), the Female Professional Greenputt Tour (FPGT), the Asexual Professional Greenputt Tour (APGT), the Not-Dead-Yet Professional Greenputt Tour (NDYPGT) and the Non-Limbed Professional Greenputt Tour (NLPGT).|"Yet Another Greenputt League" reports on the new Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour joining the other established tours|<ref name="HNN" />}}
The '''Asexual Professional Greenputt Tour''', abbreviated '''APGT''', was one of the major professional leagues of [[greenputt]],<ref name="HNN" /> a ball sport<ref name="Ballgame">{{SW|url=news/take-me-out-to-the-ballgame-sports-in-the-star-wars-galaxy-part-2|series=Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy|text=Part 2: Take Me Out to the Ball Game|nolive=1}}</ref> played on a field.<ref name="Twilight">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref> The league was overseen by the [[Greenputt Governing Council]].<ref name="HNN" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> the news story "Yet Another Greenputt League" in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] reported the formation of the [[Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour]], which joined the existing professional greenputt leagues.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Asexual Professional Greenputt Tour was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> The site's content was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
